name: Artichoke Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 oz marinated artichokes, jarred, drained and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling, salted water with a sprig of rosemary.
2. Remove the sprig and peel garlic cloves, mincing them.
3. Discard the sprig; add minced garlic to the potatoes.
4. Mash the potatoes thoroughly.
5. Stir in the drained and minced artichokes.
6. Gradually stir in milk until you achieve a creamy mixture.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with rosemary before serving.
